name: durian-merge
description: Southeast Asian Durian Merge Game - Suika-style tropical fruit puzzle

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www/js www/css www/assets && cp index.html www/ && cp js/*.js www/js/ && cp css/*.css www/css/ && cp -r assets/fruits_clean www/assets/fruits_clean 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.ss: f=screenshots/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).png && mkdir -p screenshots && ~/android-sdk/platform-tools/adb exec-out screencap -p > $f && echo $PWD/$f
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=~/android-sdk JAVA_HOME=$(/usr/libexec/java_home -v 21) ./gradlew assembleDebug && ~/android-sdk/platform-tools/adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.check:debug: grep -rn 'console\.log\|console\.debug' js/ || echo 'No debug logs found'
scripts.check:testing: grep -rn 'isTesting.*true\|initializeForTesting.*true' js/ || echo 'No testing flags found'
scripts.restart: ~/android-sdk/platform-tools/adb shell am force-stop com.durianmerge.game && sleep 3 && ~/android-sdk/platform-tools/adb shell am start -n com.durianmerge.game/.MainActivity && echo 'App restarted'
scripts.deploy:capture: npm run deploy && npm run restart && sleep 5 && npm run device:capture
